rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks or fixing syntax errors without changing unrelated architecture
generic_rules: Use valid AGREE annex blocks to encapsulate contracts
Ensure all AGREE scalar types are declared as int, real, or bool
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not add architecture to fix unresolved references; remove invalid clauses instead
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
